visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Animation phase. A centered, cute cartoon ice cream cone with large eyes and a pink swirl is shown against a pink and brown background. A bald man with an angry or determined expression appears from the chest up, wearing a black shirt and clutching his stomach in front of a neutral tan wall. (2) A small, blue, bat-like creature with yellow eyes and fangs (the Rebel Fairy) appears behind the bald man's head, hovering and speaking to him. The man's expression shifts between frustration and resistance. (3) The scene cuts back to the animated ice cream with the blue bat character now popping out of the cone. The man is shown again with a more heroic, determined facial expression against a dynamic purple-streaked background. (4) Live-action transition. A real-life blue plush coin purse, shaped like the bat character, is shown in various real-world settings: resting on a small wooden bench outside, hanging as a keychain on a man's jacket and then a grey backpack, and being held by hands to show a plastic card slot on the back. (5) A hand pours several metal coins into the open mouth of the plush purse. The video ends with a shot of an orange-and-white cat lying on a grey couch, with the plush purse placed on its back.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: Oh My God. 這個冰淇淋看起來也太好吃了吧. [Slogan]: 柑橘味. NT$ 50. 本日限定. (2) [Subtitle]: 但是現在在減肥. 不行 要忍住. 不可以吃任何甜食. [Variety]: 叛逆叛逆. (3) [Subtitle]: 減肥是明天的事. 但是過了這個冰淇淋. 就沒有這個冰淇淋了喔 叛逆. [Variety]: 叛逆. (4) [Subtitle]: 這什麼無意義的句子. 看看這個柑橘口味的冰淇淋. 多有食慾啊. 而且重點它還是本日限定呢 叛逆. [Logo]: もちろん大好き アイスクリーム. (5) [Subtitle]: 哼 叛逆仙子. 抱歉了 我現在身上沒有帶錢. 我已經長大了. 學會控制自己的情緒了. 不會再被叛逆仙子給誘惑. (6) [Subtitle]: 你有帶錢啊叛逆. 蛤 沒有啊 我沒有帶. 我就是零錢包啊叛逆. (7) [Subtitle]: 什麼都. 叛逆仙子經典造型伸縮零錢包二代. 掛在任何地方 都可可愛愛. (8) [Subtitle]: 背面還可以放悠遊卡 信用卡. 或是你推的小卡. 叛逆仙子實體化讓你日常花錢 叛逆叛逆. (9) [Logo]: もちろん大好き 叛逆叛逆. [Subtitle]: 卡特島市集 1/10-11 首賣.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 animated male main character, 1 real person (hands and partial body) demonstrating the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An animated bald man wearing a plain black t-shirt, initially looking hungry and determined.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts with flat, graphic backgrounds for the animation. Later, it transitions to a blurred outdoor garden setting with miniature plants and an indoor living room with a grey sofa.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched vocal exclamation 'Oh my God' followed by a deep-voiced male narration speaking Traditional Chinese with a determined tone. Background is quiet. (2) At ~0:05, a secondary, higher-pitched, raspy, and mischievous voice enters, representing the bat character. The two voices engage in a rapid back-and-forth dialogue. (3) An upbeat, high-tempo J-Pop/Meme style song with female Japanese vocals and synth beats begins as the dialogue continues. (4) A short impact SFX marks the transition at ~0:32. (5) Narration becomes more energetic and promotional. Audible clinking of metal coins and the sound of a zipper sliding occur as the product is demonstrated. The upbeat music continues until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Conflict -> Product Reveal -> Feature Showcase -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a comedic animated skit about resisting the temptation of 'Limited Edition' ice cream while on a diet to introduce a character-themed coin purse. It transitions from animation to live-action to demonstrate the product's physical features, such as the card slot and coin storage, ultimately promoting its first sale at an upcoming market.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names the product, shows its features, and provides specific dates for its first sale.
endorsementObject: 叛逆仙子經典造型伸縮零錢包二代

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively bridges animation and live-action to build brand personality for a character-based product.
